generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Collects real-time temperature data from building zones. Integrated into BIM model with metadata including tenant IDs, device IDs, and Hono/Ditto endpoint addresses for real-time data exchange."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Detects occupancy status in building zones. Metadata includes device IDs and Hono/Ditto endpoints for real-time synchronization with the DT."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LuminanceSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures luminance levels for adaptive lighting control. Integrated into BIM model with metadata for real-time data transmission via Eclipse Hono."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LuminanceDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Tracks energy consumption across building systems. Metadata includes device IDs and Hono/Ditto endpoints for bidirectional communication with the DT."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

instance BASDevice : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Automation System device collecting operational data (e.g., HVAC status). Metadata includes tenant IDs and Hono/Ditto configurations for real-time data exchange."
    DTDFVocab:producedData BASDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data transmitted from TemperatureSensor via Eclipse Hono to Eclipse Ditto for DT synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data transmitted from OccupancySensor via Eclipse Hono to Eclipse Ditto for DT synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LuminanceDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time luminance data transmitted from LuminanceSensor via Eclipse Hono for adaptive lighting control in the DT."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LuminanceSensor
]

instance EnergyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption data transmitted from EnergyMeter via Eclipse Hono/Ditto for energy performance analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMeter
]

instance BASDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time BAS operational data transmitted from BASDevice via Eclipse Hono/Ditto for building system monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BASDevice
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically enriched Building Information Model serving as the semantic backbone for the DT. Contains device metadata (sensors, actuators, controllers) and middleware configurations (Hono/Ditto endpoints)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoMiddleware, DittoPlatform, UnrealEngine5
]

instance RealTimeSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated real-time data from all sensing components (temperature, occupancy, luminance, energy, BAS) for DT operations."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted, OccupancyDataTransmitted, LuminanceDataTransmitted, EnergyDataTransmitted, BASDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoMiddleware, DittoPlatform
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Performance simulation models (energy consumption, occupant comfort) derived from BIM and operational data for lifecycle analysis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5, ReinforcementLearningEngine
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D interactive visualization model in Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring of building operations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
]

instance HonoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono IoT middleware for real-time data ingestion from sensors and devices. Normalizes and transmits sensor data to Eclipse Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, AutomatedCommissioningService
]

instance DittoPlatform : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto digital twin management platform enabling bidirectional communication between physical and virtual worlds. Manages device metadata and runtime configurations."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Rich visualization environment for interactive 3D monitoring and simulation of building operations. Supports real-time data visualization and lifecycle simulations."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering tools for automated extraction of domain semantics and generation of runtime artifacts (Hono/Ditto configs, Unreal Engine scenes) from BIM models."
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedDeploymentService, ServiceIntegrationService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning engine for adaptive control policies in lighting and energy systems. Optimizes real-time operational parameters."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization service in Unreal Engine 5 for real-time monitoring of building operations (temperature, occupancy, energy)."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingOperationsDashboardInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service using reinforcement learning to optimize energy consumption, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects in adaptive lighting systems."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationRecommendationInsight, LightingComfortRecommendationInsight
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated deployment of control logic (e.g., lighting semantics) directly from BIM models, reducing manual effort in system commissioning."
    DTDFVocab:provides AutomatedLightingControlDeploymentAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Lifecycle simulation service for evaluating design and operational decisions (energy performance, occupant comfort)."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyPerformanceSimulationInsight, OccupantComfortSimulationInsight
]

instance ServiceIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular service integration platform with standardized extension points for adding third-party services (IoT analytics, AI-driven maintenance)."
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomServiceIntegrationAction
]

instance AutomatedDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-driven transformation service generating runtime artifacts (Hono/Ditto configurations, Unreal Engine scenes) from BIM models with minimal manual intervention."
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeArtifactGenerationAction
]

instance BuildingOperationsDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring dashboard in Unreal Engine 5 showing operational status, performance metrics, and anomaly detection for Facility Managers."
]

instance EnergyOptimizationRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Actionable recommendations for energy-efficient operational adjustments generated by reinforcement learning algorithms."
]

instance LightingComfortRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations for visual comfort and non-visual health effects optimization in adaptive lighting systems."
]

instance EnergyPerformanceSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Lifecycle simulation results for energy performance analysis informing design and refurbishment decisions."
]

instance OccupantComfortSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Lifecycle simulation results for occupant comfort analysis informing design and operational adjustments."
]

instance AutomatedLightingControlDeploymentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated deployment of lighting control semantics from BIM models to Building Control Systems."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CustomServiceIntegrationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Integration of third-party services (IoT analytics, AI-driven maintenance) via standardized extension points."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance RuntimeArtifactGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generation of deployable runtime artifacts (Hono/Ditto configurations, Unreal Engine scenes) from BIM models."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting fixture actuator controlled via DT for adaptive lighting systems. Enabled by reinforcement learning-based control policies."
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system actuator receiving control signals from the DT for dynamic energy management."
]

instance BuildingControlSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System integrating PLCs, IoT gateways, and adaptive systems for bidirectional communication with the DT."
]

instance AdaptiveLightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning-based controller for adaptive lighting systems, dynamically adjusting parameters based on real-time data and optimization algorithms."
]

instance CentralizedDigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized DT instance representing the entire building, managed via a unified BIM model and Eclipse Ditto middleware."
]

instance DecentralizedZoneTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Decentralized sub-twin for specific building zones/systems (e.g., lighting, HVAC) operating independently or in coordination with the central twin."
]

instance HybridDigitalTwinDeployment : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Hybrid DT deployment approach (centralized system with pluggable services) demonstrated in the Living Lab case study."
]

instance ModularServiceArchitecture : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular, service-oriented architecture supporting both centralized and decentralized DT multiplicities via standardized extension points."
]

instance StandardizedExtensionPoint : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Standardized extension point enabling model-driven transformations for modular deployment of DT services."
]

instance DeviceMetadataEnrichmentPhase : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modeling phase where Building Control Engineers enrich BIM models with device metadata (sensors, actuators, controllers) and middleware configurations."
]

instance BIMModelValidationPhase : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Validation phase ensuring consistency and completeness of the BIM model before deployment."
]

instance ModelDrivenTransformationPhase : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Automated deployment phase generating runtime artifacts (Hono/Ditto configs, Unreal Engine scenes) from BIM models."
]

instance RealTimeSynchronizationPhase : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Continuous bidirectional data exchange between physical and virtual worlds enabled by Eclipse Hono and Ditto."
]

instance ServiceExtensionPhase : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Iterative service integration phase allowing DT Engineers to extend functionality via standardized extension points."
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin environment for building infrastructures (academic, commercial, residential) supporting lifecycle optimization from design to operation."
    base:contains CentralizedDigitalTwin, DecentralizedZoneTwin, HybridDigitalTwinDeployment, ModularServiceArchitecture
]

instance AECOEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Architecture, Engineering, Construction, and Operations (AECO) domain environment where the DT framework is applied."
    base:contains BIMModel, RealTimeSensorData, SimulationModel, VisualizationModel
]

instance LivingLabCaseStudyEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "LEED Platinum academic building environment demonstrating hybrid DT deployment for real-time monitoring and optimization."
    base:contains CentralizedDigitalTwin, DecentralizedZoneTwin, LightingActuator, AdaptiveLightingController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual world to the physical world involve **control signals and actuation commands** generated by the DT and transmitted back to the Building Control System (BCS). These commands are derived from **optimization algorithms, predictive analytics, or user-defined control strategies** (e.g., energy-efficient lighting schedules in TwinLight or adaptive policies in BOREALIS). The DT uses **Eclipse Ditto** to push control signals to physical actuators (e.g., dimming lights, adjusting HVAC settings) via middleware integration. The framework supports **bidirectional communication**, ensuring that virtual adjustments are executed in the physical system while maintaining synchronization through continuous feedback loops."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time (sub-second to millisecond latency)** for critical operational data (e.g., sensor readings, control signals) and **near-real-time (seconds to minutes)** for higher-level analytics and optimization tasks. The framework leverages **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** for low-latency data exchange, ensuring synchronization between the physical and virtual worlds. For example, the **BOREALIS project** uses iterative reinforcement learning, which operates on a **time scale of minutes to hours** to refine control policies based on post-occupancy data. The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the fidelity of synchronization over time."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **modular, service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
    - **BIM Model**: Central semantic repository for building data.
    - **Hono/Ditto Middleware**: Handles real-time data exchange and digital twin management.
    - **Unreal Engine Visualization Layer**: Provides immersive monitoring interfaces.
    - **Extension Points**: Standardized interfaces for integrating custom services (e.g., IoT analytics, AI-driven maintenance).
    - **Control Logic Layer**: Embedded within BIM models (e.g., lighting control semantics in TwinLight) or dynamically generated via reinforcement learning (BOREALIS).
    The constellation supports **scalable deployment** by allowing DTs to be composed of independent sub-systems (e.g., lighting, HVAC) that can be managed centrally or decentralized."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across **all lifecycle stages** of the building, including:
    1. **Design phase**: Leverages BIM models to incorporate static and dynamic data (e.g., geometric, spatial, and control semantics).
    2. **Construction phase**: Supports clash detection, simulation, and documentation generation.
    3. **Operation phase**: Enables real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and adaptive control (e.g., lighting optimization in BOREALIS).
    4. **Refurbishment/Adaptation phase**: Facilitates performance analysis and decision-making for retrofitting or repurposing buildings.
    The DT covers representations of the physical counterpart as **as-designed (ideal)**, **as-manufactured**, and **as-operated**, with continuous synchronization to ensure accuracy. The framework ensures **longevity and compatibility** with AECO standards throughout the lifecycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
    - **Real-time synchronization**: Eclipse Hono and Ditto provide **low-latency data exchange**, minimizing drift between physical and virtual representations.
    - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**: Quantifies the alignment between the DT and its physical counterpart, guiding validation efforts.
    - **Model validation**: BIM models are validated for consistency before deployment.
    - **Uncertainty management**: The framework acknowledges potential **semantic drift** (as discussed in Abbasi et al.) and supports **runtime configuration management** to adapt to changes.
    - **Verification and validation mechanisms**: Include **automated testing of model transformations** and **manual reviews by Building Control Engineers** to ensure accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical twin (PT) and digital twin (DT) is established using:
    - **Eclipse Hono**: Acts as an **IoT middleware** for ingesting sensor data and routing it to the DT via standardized protocols (e.g., MQTT, AMQP).
    - **Eclipse Ditto**: Provides **digital twin management** and **bidirectional communication** through a **things-based API**, enabling real-time synchronization.
    - **Network protocols**: The framework supports **industrial IoT protocols** (e.g., OPC UA, MQTT) for seamless integration with Building Automation Systems (BAS).
    - **Middleware metadata**: Extracted from BIM models to configure **tenant IDs, device IDs, and endpoint addresses** for secure and efficient data transmission."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted and deployed using:
    - **Cloud or edge computing**: The framework supports **scalable deployment** of DT services, with middleware (Hono/Ditto) potentially running on **edge devices** for low-latency processing.
    - **Unreal Engine 5**: Hosts the **visualization layer**, which can be deployed on **high-performance workstations or cloud-based rendering platforms**.
    - **Modular architecture**: Enables **service-oriented deployment**, where components (e.g., analytics, control logic) can be hosted independently and integrated via standardized APIs.
    - **Automated deployment pipeline**: Generated from BIM models via **model-driven transformations**, reducing manual setup and ensuring reproducibility."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is achieved through:
    - **Standardized extension points**: Allow integration with **external information systems** (e.g., ERP, CMMS, IoT platforms) via APIs.
    - **Middleware interoperability**: Eclipse Hono and Ditto support **cross-platform communication** with other DTs or legacy systems.
    - **BIM as a semantic backbone**: Enables integration with **AECO-specific tools** (e.g., Revit, ArchiCAD) and **industry standards** (e.g., IFC, COBie).
    - **Data normalization**: Sensor data and control signals are standardized before transmission, ensuring compatibility with diverse systems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to:
    - **BIM standards**: Leverages **Industry Foundation Classes (IFC)** and **COBie** for semantic interoperability.
    - **IoT and middleware standards**: Eclipse Hono and Ditto comply with **OASIS standards** (e.g., OPC UA, MQTT) for data exchange.
    - **Model-driven engineering (MDE) standards**: Uses **metamodels and domain-specific languages (DSLs)** to ensure consistency in model transformations.
    - **AECO-specific standards**: Aligns with **building automation and control standards** (e.g., ASHRAE, ISO 16750) for operational data."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
    - **Middleware security**: Eclipse Hono and Ditto provide **authentication, authorization, and encryption** for data transmission.
    - **Access control**: Role-based access (e.g., Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers) ensures **secure interaction** with the DT.
    - **Safety protocols**: The framework supports **remote operation safeguards**, such as **fail-safes and validation checks**, to prevent unintended physical actions (e.g., unsafe lighting adjustments).
    - **Compliance with regulations**: Aligns with **cybersecurity standards** (e.g., ISO/IEC 27001) and **safety protocols** for building automation systems (e.g., IEC 62368-1). The **BOREALIS project** emphasizes **non-visual health effects** (e.g., circadian lighting), ensuring safe and ergonomic operational adjustments."
]
